name: @radzor/telegram-bot
description: Telegram bot component using the Bot API. Send messages, photos, reply keyboards, and inline keyboards.

events.name: onMessageSent
events.description: Fired when a message is successfully sent

actions.name: sendMessage
actions.description: Send a text message to a chat

actions.name: sendPhoto
actions.description: Send a photo to a chat

actions.name: sendReplyKeyboard
actions.description: Send a message with a reply keyboard

actions.name: sendInlineKeyboard
actions.description: Send a message with inline keyboard buttons
